name: the-fisherman-garden-vegan-restaurant-cafe
description: Reusable restaurant website template — Google Maps link to tailored bilingual site with SEO/AEO bake pipeline.

scripts.build: node scripts/prebake.mjs && node scripts/verify-crawlable.js --file index.html && node scripts/verify-no-template-data.js
scripts.build:demo: node scripts/prebake.mjs && node scripts/verify-crawlable.js --file index.html && node scripts/verify-no-template-data.js --allow-incomplete
